article_title: Agentic-Agile：为什么 AI 智能体开发需要敏捷，而不只是提示词
core_theme: 提示词驱动的开发在规模化时会崩溃，需要将经典敏捷方法论适配给人类与 AI 智能体协作团队
reader_takeaway: 理解为什么 Spec-first + 结构化 Backlog + 治理优先的 Agentic-Agile 方法能解决提示词驱动开发的根本问题
summary_angle: 从混乱提示到结构化合约：对照两种开发方式的核心差异与根本原因

information_blocks.source_anchor: Prompt-driven development produces: No backlog, No concept of done, No phased delivery, No governance
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：一个开发者被散乱的对话气泡和提示词包围，代码混乱飘散

information_blocks.source_anchor: Agentic-Agile: Specs in Backlog first → Contract-driven execution → Incremental delivery → Governance from day one
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧：整齐的看板/故事卡片，人类与 AI 智能体并排在一个有序的工作流中

information_blocks.source_anchor: Upgrading the model does not fix missing acceptance criteria. A more capable agent working against an ambiguous spec produces more sophisticated drift.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央分隔线：混乱 vs 有序的鲜明对照，上方用箭头指向从左到右的转变

main_metaphor: 建筑蓝图与施工秩序 — 有蓝图的团队 vs 没有计划的工地
primary_subject: 一名工程师与 AI 智能体并排在看板前审查故事卡片
subject_action: 工程师指向结构化的 Backlog 卡片，AI 智能体在左侧面对散乱的提示词
style_direction: conceptual editorial illustration with american-comic graphic novel tension
comic_style_reason: 这是一篇 analysis 类型文章，核心叙事是判断与冲突（提示词驱动 vs 规范先行），american-comic 的粗轮廓、halftone 和强对照编辑感最适合表达这种判断张力
draft_goal: 验证左右对照构图是否清晰表达混乱提示 vs 有序规范的核心对比
revision_targets: 如果左右分界不明确则加强对照线
如果标签文字过多则删减至 1-2 个
如果主体不清楚则突出工程师+AI智能体的协作关系
final_prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. American comic graphic novel style: bold outlines, halftone shading, high contrast, editorial graphic novel tension. Two-panel split composition: LEFT panel shows chaotic prompt-driven development — a lone developer surrounded by scattered chat bubbles, overlapping prompts, tangled code fragments floating in the air, dark background, red-tinted disorder. RIGHT panel shows structured Agentic-Agile — an engineer and a glowing AI companion figure standing side by side in front of an organized kanban board with neat story cards, blue-tinted order and clarity. A bold vertical dividing line separates the two panels. Small Chinese text labels: '提示词驱动' on left panel, '规范先行' on right panel. No watermarks, no fake dashboards, no terminal output, no architecture diagrams, no hero slogans, no English text.
